mapper.select: SELECT t.ID AS id, t.YEAR AS year, t.MAINTENANCE_UNIT_ID AS maintenanceUnitId, t.MAINTENANCE_UNIT_NAME AS maintenanceUnitName, t.COST_TYPE AS costType, d.DICT_LABEL AS costTypeName, t.AMOUNT AS amount, t.CREATE_BY AS createBy, t.CREATE_TIME AS createTime, t.UPDATE_BY AS updateBy, t.UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime, t.WARNING_USER_ID, t.WARNING_USER_NAME, t.WARNING_AMOUNT FROM E_COST_BUDGET_MANAGEMENT t LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA d ON d.DICT_TYPE = 'EXPENSE_TYPE' AND d.DICT_VALUE = t.COST_TYPE AND d.STATUS = '1' WHERE t.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_COST_BUDGET_MANAGEMENT ( ID, YEAR, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_ID, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_NAME, COST_TYPE, AMOUNT, WARNING_USER_ID, WARNING_USER_NAME, WARNING_AMOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{year}, #{maintenanceUnitId}, #{maintenanceUnitName}, #{costType}, #{amount}, #{warningUserId}, #{warningUserName}, #{warningAmount}, #{loginUserId}, #{now}, #{loginUserId}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE E_COST_BUDGET_MANAGEMENT SET YEAR = #{year}, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_ID = #{maintenanceUnitId}, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_NAME = #{maintenanceUnitName}, WARNING_USER_ID = #{warningUserId}, WARNING_USER_NAME = #{warningUserName}, WARNING_AMOUNT = #{warningAmount}, COST_TYPE = #{costType}, AMOUNT = #{amount}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName FROM SYS_USER u JOIN SYS_DEPT d ON u.DEPT_ID = d.ID JOIN SYS_ROLE_USER ru ON u.ID = ru.USER_ID JOIN SYS_ROLE r ON ru.ROLE_ID = r.ID WHERE u.STATUS = 1 AND r.STATUS = 1 AND r.ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode} AND (d.ID = #{useCompanyId} OR instr(d.PARENT_IDS, #{useCompanyId}) > 0) ORDER BY u.USER_NAME ASC

select id, year, maintenance_unit_id, maintenance_unit_name, cost_type, amount, warning_user_id, warning_user_name, warning_amount, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from e_cost_budget_management

select sum(t1.TOTAL_ACTUAL_AMOUNT) from E_COST_SETTLEMENT_APPLY t1 LEFT JOIN BPM_BUSINESS_INSTANCE t3 ON t3.BUSINESS_DATA_ID = t1.ID where t3.INSTANCE_STATUS = '2' and USE_COMPANY_ID = #{useCompanyId} and to_char(APPLY_TIME, 'yyyy') = #{year}

SELECT t1.ID, t1.CONTRACT_NAME, t1.CONTRACT_CODE, t1.CONTRACT_AMOUNT, to_char(t1.START_DATE, 'yyyy') AS startYear, to_char(t1.END_DATE, 'yyyy') AS endYear, t1.START_DATE, t1.END_DATE, t1.APPLY_SCOPE, t1.STATUS, t1.CONTRACT_TYPE, t1.USE_COMPANY_ID, t1.USE_COMPANY_NAME
FROM E_COST_CONTRACT_INFO t1 WHERE t1.STATUS = '1' AND t1.USE_COMPANY_ID = #{useCompanyId} AND (to_char(t1.START_DATE, 'yyyy') = #{year} OR to_char(t1.END_DATE, 'yyyy') = #{year})

select sum(t1.TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT) from E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE t1 LEFT JOIN BPM_BUSINESS_INSTANCE t3 ON t3.BUSINESS_DATA_ID = t1.ID where t3.INSTANCE_STATUS = '2' and USE_COMPANY_ID = #{useCompanyId} and to_char(CREATE_TIME, 'yyyy') = #{year}
SELECT count(id) FROM SYS_NOTIFICATION WHERE BUSSINESS_ID = #{id}
